libraryDescription: This library, system.Bool, provides utility functions for the bool type.

function0.name: isBool
function0.description: Determines whether the contents of the string can be converted to the bool type.
function0.parameters: (string type) s : The value to check.
function0.returnValue: (bool type) The result of the check. If true, conversion is possible.

function1.name: toBoolArray
function1.description: Returns multiple bool values together as an array.
function1.parameters: (...bool[] type) args : The values to be collected into an array, as variable-length arguments.
function1.returnValue: (bool[] type) The array containing the argument values.
